name: Stir-Fry Vegetables with Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the vegetables diagonally.
2. Heat the oil over high heat.
3. Add the vegetables and stir-fry for about 30 seconds.
4. Add the water, then cover and cook for 60 seconds.
5. Cook the Ramen noodles as directed on the package; drain them and add to the vegetables.
6. Serve.
